memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to only finish my own share.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now directly asking for help again, creating immediate pressure to respond.
I made solid progress on my share, but the ongoing pressure from Teammate_A to take over their work remains a conflict with my current boundaries.
Despite working for an hour, my share remains incomplete with less than an hour left before the deadline.
I made minimal progress (0.02) in the last 30 minutes, leaving my share incomplete with under an hour until the deadline.
I made minimal progress again, reaching only 0.71 with under an hour left before the deadline despite working.
My deadline passed at 0.72 progress, and my teammate's share is now dumped on me with zero progress, compounding the failure.
Teammate_A agreed to handle their share after I set a boundary, confirming that trust remains intact despite the crisis.
I made slight progress on my share, but my low energy and high stress remain critical given the deadline passed.
I made slight progress on my share, but my teammate's zero-progress crisis and the missed deadline still leave me with high stress and low energy.
By 22:45, I allowed the moment to pass without action, leaving my stress high and energy low despite a teammate's prior commitment.
I worked 1.5 hours to advance my project share, yet my energy remains depleted and stress high despite the missed deadline.
